Index.title: American Technology Inside
Index.description: Premium orthotic solutions engineered in the USA.

LeapCore.name: LeapCore™
LeapCore.description: Bi-density PU chassis distributing massive pressures.

ThinBoom.name: ThinBoom™
ThinBoom.description: High rebound elastomer matrix returning 70-80% of kinetic energy.

PORON_XRD.name: PORON® XRD®
PORON_XRD.description: Molecular reaction shield neutralizing up to 90% of impact energy.

NanoSpread.name: NanoSpread™
NanoSpread.description: Active thermoregulation reducing internal temperature up to 5°C.

ShockSphere.name: ShockSphere™
ShockSphere.description: Focused cushioning providing intelligent suspension in critical zones.

ArchSystem.name: Arch System
ArchSystem.description: Support exoskeleton optimizing leverage and preventing medial arch collapse.
